title: carex aquatilis var. stans
intro: Carex aquatilis var. stans is a variant of the water sedge plant, a type of aquatic grass that grows in wetlands and is native to North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Carex aquatilis var. stans include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
